comment.body:
nice work @Chad  :))

for the daily commentary levels, just watch the 1min volume profile.

btw, when one is looking at positioning, they must alaways compare it to the structure.
thats what matters...
these gamma, vanna charm etc. things are only secondary, and only mean something in that context.
